name: text-to-cad-coach
description: Refines physical-part ideas, generates parametric CAD, exports STEP and mesh files, and validates the results.

interface.shortDescription: Refine ideas and generate validated CAD files.
interface.longDescription: An end-to-end workflow for parametric and 3D-printable CAD parts. It refines requirements, generates source and STEP geometry, exports requested mesh formats, and validates dimensions and printability.
defaultPrompt: Turn my idea into a validated STEP model.
Design and generate a Duplo-compatible part.
Review and implement my CAD requirements.
